name: IdsEdwProvSvcDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT t.PROV_SVC_SK, t.PROV_SVC_ID, t.ENTY_CAT_ID, t.SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, t.PROV_SVC_DESC, t.PROV_SVC_FLTR_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_SVC t WHERE t.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT * FROM cte

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwProvSvcDExtr
Read all the Data from IDS PROV_SVC Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK
Write Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvSvcDLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
